title: Front Office Manager - Celebi India - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Celebi India - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
We at Celebi India are looking for an experienced Front Office Manager based out of Jaipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Celebi India:
Celebi India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in HACCP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Celebi India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
